merge_gate.one_liner: Audio-transcription fix is correct and wired; streaming chat fix is dead code — OVHCloudChatCompletionStreamingHandler is never instantiated in production, so tests pass but the normalization does not run on live traffic.
unintended_consequences: After 2026-05-11 (OVHCloud deadline), ovhcloud streaming reasoning models silently return chunks where reasoning_content is absent — the PR's normalization class never executes because OVHCloudChatConfig does not override get_model_response_iterator; OpenAIChatCompletionStreamingHandler runs instead.

OpenAIChatCompletionStreamingHandler._map_reasoning_to_reasoning_content unconditionally pops 'reasoning' and overwrites 'reasoning_content', whereas OVHCloud's handler preserves existing reasoning_content when both fields coexist during the transition window — behavioral divergence the PR claims is handled correctly but is not tested on the production code path.
hot_path_notes: OVHCloud is a narrow provider path, not a hot path at 10k+ RPS; blast radius is limited to ovhcloud streaming reasoning requests only.
merge_gate.what_would_make_yes: Add get_model_response_iterator override in OVHCloudChatConfig that returns OVHCloudChatCompletionStreamingHandler; update at least one test to call OVHCloudChatConfig.get_model_response_iterator() to prove the handler is wired, not just directly instantiated. Alternatively, drop the dead class, document that OpenAIChatCompletionStreamingHandler already covers the migration, and add a test exercising the real production path.

findings.bug_class: streaming reasoning normalization unreachable in production
evidence: litellm/llms/ovhcloud/chat/transformation.py:78-128 — OVHCloudChatCompletionStreamingHandler defined but no get_model_response_iterator override in OVHCloudChatConfig to select it

litellm/llms/openai/chat/gpt_transformation.py:771-781 — OpenAIGPTConfig.get_model_response_iterator returns OpenAIChatCompletionStreamingHandler; OVHCloudChatConfig inherits this without override — verified by grep showing zero matches for get_model_response_iterator in litellm/llms/ovhcloud/

litellm/llms/openai/chat/gpt_transformation.py:784-820 — OpenAIChatCompletionStreamingHandler._map_reasoning_to_reasoning_content already maps reasoning→reasoning_content via pop, so production behavior is partially correct but with different semantics (unconditional overwrite vs preserve-existing)

tests/test_litellm/llms/ovhcloud/test_ovhcloud_chat_transformation.py:297-367 — all three migration tests directly instantiate OVHCloudChatCompletionStreamingHandler, not through OVHCloudChatConfig.get_model_response_iterator; production code path is untested
findings.recommended_fix: Override get_model_response_iterator in OVHCloudChatConfig (litellm/llms/ovhcloud/chat/transformation.py) to return OVHCloudChatCompletionStreamingHandler. Add a test that calls config.get_model_response_iterator() with a real streaming_response to prove wiring. Without this, the 2026-05-11 deadline passes, reasoning_content is absent from ovhcloud responses, and no code in the production path corrects it — relying on OpenAIChatCompletionStreamingHandler's existing pop behavior which differs from the PR's stated semantics.
